nasb.text: I smote you and every work of your hands with blasting wind, mildew and hail; yet you did not come back to Me,’ declares the Lord.

esv.text: I struck you and all the products of your toil with blight and with mildew and with hail, yet you did not turn to me, declares the Lord.

cnv.text: 耶和華說：‘我用旱風、霉爛和冰雹擊打你們，和你們手裡的一切工作，你們還是不歸向我。

ccb.text: 我曾用虫灾、霉灾和冰雹毁灭你们的作物，你们仍没有归向我。这是耶和华说的。
